doc_title: Lory: Fully Differentiable Mixture-of-Experts for Autoregressive Language Model Pre-training

items.evidence_span: We follow LLaMA (Touvron et al., 2023a) and use SwiGLU (Shazeer, 2020) as the activation function in FFNs. We use the same tokenizer as the LLaMA models (Touvron et al., 2023a;b).
We follow LLaMA (Touvron et al., 2023a) and use SwiGLU (Shazeer, 2020) as the activation function in FFNs.
